source_summary.allowed_use: Read-only operational truth after access and payload shape are verified.
source_summary.forbidden_use: May not mutate CMS, provider, collector, scheduler, or production state.

source_summary.source_name: Public runtime HTML and discovery files
source_summary.allowed_use: Rendered SEO truth for status, redirects, canonical, robots, schema, hreflang, sitemap, and llms inclusion.
source_summary.forbidden_use: Cannot infer CMS editorial intent or approve mutation.

source_summary.allowed_use: Dashboard shell and UI contract review only.
source_summary.forbidden_use: Must not drive production SEO decisions until bridged to seo_intel read models.

evidence_items.summary: Existing weekly automation is active and hard-bounded as read-only.
Dashboard uses artifact-backed operations data and labels the surface as Contract-backed mock.
Repo evidence indicates fixture-only GSC collector behavior; live row freshness remains unverified.

runtime_findings.title: /en/articles/mbti-basics redirects to zh article
runtime_findings.summary: Runtime sample found 308 redirect from /en/articles/mbti-basics to /zh/articles/mbti-basics. This may be intentional for a zh-only article but requires CMS/article route-policy confirmation.

ops_dashboard_findings.title: /ops/seo-operations KPI card data is mixed
ops_dashboard_findings.summary: Issue/blocked counts can derive from a static artifact, while other readiness/indexed values remain mock.

ops_dashboard_findings.title: /ops/seo-operations trend, keyword, and page tables are mock
ops_dashboard_findings.summary: Traffic trend, keyword opportunity, and page performance modules are hard-coded mock data and must not drive production SEO decisions.

ops_dashboard_findings.title: Issue queue is static artifact-backed
ops_dashboard_findings.summary: Issue/task queue rows map from docs/seo/generated/seo-issue-queue.v1.json and are suitable only as contract shell data.

seo_intel_findings.title: seo_intel read endpoints exist
seo_intel_findings.summary: fap-api defines admin-gated read-only endpoints for overview, URL truth, issues, trends, page performance, and conversion funnel.

gsc_status.summary: seo_gsc_daily schema and readers exist, but production live data freshness and fixture-vs-live state are unknown.

cms_status.summary: CMS admin surfaces and preview gates exist, but CMS draft/write automation is not approved.
cms_status.blocked_reason: CMS Draft Agent remains HOLD until dry-run package and approval gates exist.

search_channel_status.summary: Search Channel queue tables and guardrails exist; writes and live submissions are disabled by default.
search_channel_status.blocked_reason: Search-provider execution remains human-authorized and out of MVP0.

candidate_actions.summary: Create the control-plane contract and schemas.
Add repeatable public runtime SEO QA after this contract lands.
Bridge /ops/seo-operations to fap-api seo_intel read models.
Validate GSC table freshness and live-vs-fixture status before opportunity queue work.
Hold until GSC data quality passes.
Hold until dry-run package contract, preview QA, and approval gates exist.

blocked_actions.required_approval: Exact human approval naming entity, URL, action, and lane.

blocked_actions.action: GSC Request Indexing or provider submit
blocked_actions.reason: Search provider mutation is out of scope.
Live GSC data quality is not verified.

Bridge Ops SEO dashboard to seo_intel read models

scope: docs/seo/agent/runtime-qa/** or explicitly authorized QA script files

recommended_prs.title: Add read-only GSC data quality gate

observation_windows.purpose: Verify runtime rendering and no accidental SEO regression.
rollback_conditions: canonical points to wrong language or private URL

observation_windows.purpose: Review early search and indexability signals.
rollback_conditions: CTR or query mix suggests misleading title/meta

observation_windows.purpose: Trend review before scaling similar actions.
rollback_conditions: Unexpected private URL or claim-risk signal
expand_conditions: Positive trend with stable conversion path
No new claim or private URL issue

review_questions: Is the final verdict supported by evidence?
Should CMS Draft Agent remain HOLD?
Are claim-risk or unsupported assumptions present?
gpt55_handoff.authority_boundary: GPT 5.5 Pro may advise on strategy and claim boundaries but cannot approve CMS mutation or search-provider submission.

final_verdict.summary: Proceed with the docs-only control packet. Hold Opportunity Queue and CMS Draft Agent until their prerequisites pass.
